hero.tagline: Discover the spirit of Sarajevo — find places, cafés, and hidden gems all around you.

sections.attractiveLocationsHint: Attractions you marked for the homepage in the CMS
sections.attractiveBusinessesHint: Portal businesses not already shown in the hero or highlights rows
sections.ourMissionText: Our mission is to provide the best service and quality to our clients, creating long-term value and sustainable innovation in every area of our work.
sections.ourPlaceText: In the heart of Bosnia and Herzegovina, surrounded by mountains and infused with a spirit of diversity, lies Sarajevo — a city where east and west meet in the most beautiful harmony. This is a place where history breathes on every corner, and modern energy creates new stories every day.

footer.description: Explore Sarajevo connects you with the best businesses, attractions, and experiences in Sarajevo — all in one place.

contact.description: Explore Sarajevo connects you with the best businesses, attractions, and experiences in Sarajevo — all in one place, clearly organized and tailored for both tourists and locals who want to discover something new in their city.

features.findBestPlacesDesc: Find the best locations in Sarajevo with detailed information and directions on how to get there.
features.easyNavigationDesc: Intuitive map and filters help you quickly find exactly what you're looking for.
features.localBusinessesDesc: Support the local economy by discovering authentic Sarajevo businesses and services.

about.pageSubtitle: Discover Sarajevo in a completely new way
about.description1: Explore Sarajevo is a digital platform that connects you with the best businesses, attractions, and experiences in the city of Sarajevo. Our mission is to make it easier for you to discover everything this beautiful city has to offer.
about.description2: Whether you're looking for the best restaurants, cafés, cultural events, or hidden gems of the city, Explore Sarajevo is your reliable guide through the rich offerings of the capital of Bosnia and Herzegovina.

features.locationsDesc: Find the best locations in Sarajevo with detailed information and directions on how to get there.
features.businessesDesc: Discover the best businesses in the city, from restaurants to boutiques.
features.eventsDesc: Stay up to date with the latest events and cultural happenings in Sarajevo.

privacy.pageSubtitle: Protecting your privacy is important to us
